CVE-2023-24056.title: In pkgconf through 1.9.3, variable duplication can cause unbounde ...
CVE-2023-24056.description: In pkgconf through 1.9.3, variable duplication can cause unbounded string expansion due to incorrect checks in libpkgconf/tuple.c:pkgconf_tuple_parse. For example, a .pc file containing a few hundred bytes can expand to one billion bytes.
